scenes.title: The Final Deadline
scenes.scene_summary: As the city lights of Seoul sparkle below, Seo-yoon and Ji-ho sit huddled over their laptops on the school rooftop. The air is cool, and the tension of the upcoming presentation hangs over them. They work in a comfortable rhythm, finalizing the last slides of their project. When the 'Save' icon finally stops spinning, they realize they’ve finished hours ahead of schedule. The silence of the school at night creates an intimate bubble around them, shifting the mood from academic stress to quiet companionship.

scenes.title: Lines and Shadows
scenes.scene_summary: Seo-yoon compliments the professional quality of the illustrations they used in the presentation, assuming they were sourced online. Ji-ho hesitates before reaching into his bag and pulling out a worn, leather-bound sketchbook. He reveals that he is the artist behind every drawing. As Seo-yoon flips through the pages, she discovers not only the project work but dozens of candid, beautiful sketches of herself studying, laughing, and arguing during their late-night sessions. She is stunned by his secret talent and the obvious care he put into capturing her likeness.

scenes.title: More Than a Game
scenes.scene_summary: Under the canopy of stars, the atmosphere becomes heavy with unspoken words. Ji-ho closes his sketchbook and looks out at the horizon. He admits that he used to see life like a video game—something to be optimized and won. However, he confesses to Seo-yoon that the time they spent together, even the moments of bickering over the project, has felt more rewarding and 'real' than any high score he’s ever achieved. He looks her in the eyes and tells her that he doesn't want the partnership to end just because the project is over.

scenes.title: A New Sunrise
scenes.scene_summary: The first hues of pink and gold begin to bleed into the night sky as dawn approaches. Seo-yoon meets Ji-ho's gaze, her own feelings finally surfacing. They stand close together at the rooftop railing, the morning wind ruffling their hair. In a classic romantic climax, Ji-ho leans in, closing the distance between them. The scene captures a 'will-they-won't-they' heartbeat of anticipation that culminates in a soft, meaningful kiss just as the sun breaks over the city, signaling the start of a new chapter in their lives beyond the classroom.
